query:
SELECT a.id, a.name, a.consultorId, c.name AS consultorName, a.programId, a.turmaId
FROM alunos a
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON a.consultorId = c.id
WHERE a.name LIKE '%Vanessa%Bertholdo%' OR a.name LIKE '%Vanessa%Vargas%';
